description: Public visibility controls for course options. active_public courses may show menu entries, public inventory, and seed offers. menu_only_suppressed courses remain visible in course menus/hubs but are not shown as normal public inventory or seeded. hidden courses are removed from menus, hubs, inventory, and seeding.

menu_only_suppressed.suppressed_public_copy: Public dates are not currently listed for this option. This course may be available by request or for group training.

351632.title: AHA Heartsaver Pediatric First Aid / CPR / AED
351632.reason: Visible as a real Heartsaver course option, but suppressed from normal public scheduled inventory until Brian re-enables public in-person pediatric dates.
